title: The Trap Tightens Around the Alliance
description: Pages 17–17 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo Family, Franky, Unknown person #1 as dressrosa’s toys and forgotten people reveal that Doflamingo’s rule has erased lives, memories, and families from the country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Noland helped anyone who was in trouble!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah!! That's what a true hero does!! And I'm the same way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Leo!! The Don- Quixote family members in the Palace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Have started to move!! They're probably heading for the colos- Seum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Our Battle is on dress- Rosa!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: In the basement of the Col- Ossuum!! At the "Dark Factory"!

summary: Pages 17–17 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
